Video.summary: Bondi Beach lifeguards face new challenges and make daring rescues patrolling Australia's most famous beach.
Video.title: Bondi Rescue

Video.summary: Harrison saves a Korean tour group caught in a rip. Reidy attempts to become the greatest Bondi Santa.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 03

Video.summary: A lifeless swimmer is dragged from the water. Lifeguards compete in a fancy dress surfing competition.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 10

Video.summary: Lifeguards conduct an experiment, attempting to combat the lack of beachgoers reading dangerous current signs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 09

Video.summary: Singlets treats a severely dislocated knee. Conan O’Brien tries his hand at lifeguarding.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 07

Video.summary: A man breaks his leg, Maxi uses a tracking device to locate a thief and a bunch of school kids run wild.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 12

Video.summary: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 07

Video.summary: Jesse responds to a report of a man falling from cliffs. A thick fog makes it impossible to see swimmers.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 08

Video.summary: New lifeguard Will attends to an unconscious teen. Harries helps tame a fleet of giant inflatables.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 04

Video.summary: A miscommunication between lifeguards on the radio could cause serious problems in the water.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 09

Video.summary: An American tourist needs CPR after being pulled unconscious from the ocean in calm waters.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 01

Video.summary: Lifeguards face frustrating distractions involving lost gear, wayward children, ball games, and somersaults
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 06

Video.summary: A man comes to lifeguards with a deep stab wound. A man is brought to shore with no feeling in his lower body.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 04

Video.summary: The lifeguards take the beach buggy into the streets, chasing down an aggressive beachgoer wielding a knife.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 02

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a deep water spinal rescue, and try catch a rat that’s been eating cables in their buggies.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 11

Video.summary: A backpacker has a violent seizure for over 15 minutes. Sam attempts a daring move during a dangerous rescue.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 09

Video.summary: Jethro takes on the toughest rescue of his career so far. Waves swamp the lifeguard 4WD buggy.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 06

Video.summary: After Jack rescues a drunk swimmer, the Bondi Rescue camera crew is attacked.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 04

Video.summary: A New Years Eve beach event with hundreds of participants leads the group directly into a rip.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 04

Video.summary: Bondi faces a bluebottle invasion. Singlets attends his own son's spinal injury. Clint rescues a drowning man.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 05

Video.summary: Bluebottles swarm at Bondi, so Harries devises a magical treatment for the stings.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 08

Video.summary: Reidy attempts a world record while a girl is blown kilometres out to sea on a paddle board.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 08

Video.summary: Trainee Lachie completes his first big solo rescue. The team farewell one of their most dedicated lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 08

Video.summary: Jack’s rescuing a boy in big swell and makes a bold call when they’re almost smashed onto rocks.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 10

Video.summary: A torrential downpour sparks a flood on the beach and Tommy saves Christmas Day again.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 05

Video.summary: Hoppo shows newbies how to perform a mass-rescue single handedly. Trainee Burkey faces his first drowning.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 01

Video.summary: Big waves come to Bondi and Maxi hits trouble during a daring jetski rescue.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 06

Video.summary: A Chinese backpacker is left comatose after-hours. A father loses his son in a massive crowd.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 02

Video.summary: The lifeguards deal with drowning boogie boarders. Jesse gets a buoy rope stuck in the jetski intake.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 07

Video.summary: Harry loses his temper so Hoppo tests lifeguards' customer service skills with a "mystery shopper".
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 05

Video.summary: Chappo nabs a bag snatcher. Whippet and Reidy treat an unconscious woman. A skateboarder dislocates his ankle.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 10

Video.summary: A seizure on the sand challenges Kerrbox, while a new trainee's attitude raises concerns among lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 02

Video.summary: On the hottest day ever in Bondi, a fight erupts on the beach. A couple is swept half a kilometre out to sea.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 04

Video.summary: Bisho performs a cliff-face rescue with limited gear. Trainee Taco redeems himself with a big surf rescue.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 08

Video.summary: New Years Eve brings drunk swimmers, buggy thieves and shark sightings prompting a beach evacuation of 40,010.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 03

Video.summary: The Rooster NRL team injure Yatesy on a rescue board. A teenager breaks her nose. Luke rescues a deaf patient.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 12

Video.summary: Harry risks losing his job, thieves face a violent citizens arrest and a mother searches for her daughter.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 01

Video.summary: Chappo rushes in for a life and death rescue in the monster swells, but things don’t go as planned.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 04

Video.summary: Lifeguards deal with a missing boy and two friends - one dislocates his hip, the other has a seizure.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 07

Video.summary: Julie learns the ropes on Bondi. A man confronts a photographer taking pictures of his topless girlfriend.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 08

Video.summary: Yatesy attempts to rescue an inexperienced surfer. After shark sightings, the lifeguards test new technology.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 11

Video.summary: A large bull shark prompts lifeguards to sound the alarm, clearing thousands of swimmers from the water.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 01

Video.summary: As lifeguards try bring back a woman found lifeless between the flags, her mentally impaired son arrives.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 02

Video.summary: Jethro rescues a man more than double his size, then accidentally locks himself in the lifeguard tower.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 03

Video.summary: Cyclonic swell hits Bondi Beach with 12-foot waves. H lectures drunken youths. New drone technology is tested.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 10

Video.summary: Swimmer in trouble refuses rescue. Faddy deals with a motionless man. Reidy and Corey assist two drunk girls.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 10

Video.summary: Rookie Max wows with a rescue. A Korean student's surfing trip turns painful. Stolen car keys are reported.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards aid surfers and chase an odd beach intruder. Australia Day brings Harrison's toughest rescue yet.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 04

Video.summary: Bondi reopens. Lifeguards rescue a paraglider and try to fix the buggy. Lifeguard Max Milligan's first rescue.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 01

Video.summary: Max attends shark net rescue. Lifeguards handle skate park injuries and rescue struggling swimmers.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 03
